Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0800 "VALKYRIE17-0800" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Valkyrie 17.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Changed the JSR $0F91 instruction at $0E69 to JMP $0E74 instead to skip the question asking if this is a pirate copy of the game.
